motivation: aura-canva-app(Canva Content Publisher) client contract is frozen but Aura-board receiver side (padlet Next.js) lacks PAT-prefix auth, tier gating, 3-axis rate limit, streaming Blob upload, and teacher-managed token UI. v1 endpoint `/api/external/cards` + `ExternalAccessToken` exist (P0-② v1) but need hardening per Seed 8 (seed_26af361e92b7, ambiguity 0.121).
user_story: 교사로서 Aura-board 설정에서 PAT를 발급받아 Canva 앱에 등록하면, Canva에서 만든 디자인이 지정 보드의 카드로 자동 생성된다 — Pro tier 전용, rate-limited, 4MB 이하 스트리밍 업로드로.
success_metric: Galaxy Tab S6 Lite PAT 생성 <10s, p95 upload <2000ms (3MB PNG), Free tier → 402 + upgrade CTA, 토큰 1회 노출 재표시 불가, 3-stage 마이그 Stage 1 applied (nullable tokenPrefix)
